title: Gooey Berry Dal
description: A sweet and savory Indian dessert made with fresh berries and gooey dal. Perfect for warm weather.

ingredients.name: Fresh Berries
ingredients.notes: any mix of berries (strawberries, blueberries, raspberries)

instructions: In a saucepan, combine the fresh dal and milk.
Bring the mixture to a boil, then reduce the heat to low and simmer for 5 minutes.
Add the sugar, cardamom powder, and gooey dal to the saucepan.
Stir well and cook for another 2-3 minutes.
Add the fresh berries to the saucepan and cook for 1 minute.
Remove the saucepan from the heat and stir in the ghee.
Let the mixture cool to room temperature.
Serve chilled or warm, garnished with additional fresh berries if desired.
Refrigerate for at least 30 minutes to allow the flavors to meld together.
